title: Decision: webhook key comparison is correctly constant-time
description: The handle_webhook in src/webhook.rs hashes both the expected and provided keys with SHA-256 before calling ct_eq(). This correctly prevents timing side-channels on variable-length keys. The approach is sound.
close_reason: All pass 4 fixes applied: media SSRF+size guard, mime/format consistency, proper keyId parsing, fail-closed sig verify, path reconstruction, key owner validation, media cap, blocking stdin fix, conflicts_with
